tools.name: tiket-flight
tools.description: Search for flight tickets between two cities. Use this tool when the user wants to find flights, book airfare, or travel by plane between an origin and destination.

tools.name: tiket-hotel
tools.description: Search for hotel accommodations in a specific region or city. Use this tool when the user wants to find hotels, book accommodations, or find a place to stay.

tools.name: tiket-todo
tools.description: Search for attractions things to do,  in a specific region or city or nearby. Use this tool when the user wants to find attractions.
